name: My company offered a quick settlement—should I take it?
description: No. Quick settlements often undervalue future medical needs and permanent disability. Wait until you reach Maximum Medical Improvement (MMI) and get an impairme

mainEntity.name: My company offered a quick settlement—should I take it?

acceptedAnswer.text: No. Quick settlements often undervalue future medical needs and permanent disability. Wait until you reach Maximum Medical Improvement (MMI) and get an impairment rating before settling.
